steps.t: The summoning horn can be found near the Bridge of Khazad-dûm, behind Svanr in Nud-melek. You should summon Svanr to your side when you are ready to l…
A good place to rest can likely be found near Sudulthurkh, the northern cross-roads of Nud-melek. Svanr can be summoned using the horn he gave you. Yo…
Svanr is at the cross-roads of Sudulthurkh in north-eastern Nud-melek. You should speak with Svanr.
